name: AMNIOTIC BAND SYNDROME
definition: CONGENITAL CONSTRICTION BAND SEQUENCE = EARLY AMNION RUPTURE SYNDROME "slash defects" in nonanatomic distribution
dominant_finding: very thin sheet / band attached to fetus:
discriminating_features: very thin sheet / band attached to fetus:
fine linear echoes that extend from fetal defect to uterine wall but are difficult to see
membrane that flaps with fetal movement
restriction of fetal motion ← entrapment of fetal parts by bands
simple grooves / constriction rings of limbs / digits

general: very thin sheet / band attached to fetus:
fine linear echoes that extend from fetal defect to uterine wall but are difficult to see
membrane that flaps with fetal movement
restriction of fetal motion ← entrapment of fetal parts by bands
simple grooves / constriction rings of limbs / digits
± attachment of head to uterine wall
abdominal contents floating in amniotic fluid without clear visualization of encasing
